title: rosa × dumetorum var. cinerascens
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. cinerascens, also known as the hybrid wild rose, is a variety of rose that is native to Eastern Asia and is characterized by its pink to red flowers and woody stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. cinerascens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, making it useful for treating various health issues. Rosa × dumetorum var. cinerascens can be prepared in herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
